'''Nwarcol Point''', also known as the '''Sisar Terminal''', was a major refueling starport located in the [[Nwarcol system/Legends|Nwarcol system]] where the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]] and [[Salin Corridor/Legends|Salin Corridor]] merged. Despite being small, it saw a great deal of traffic, benefiting not only from its location (which attracted a great number of small- and medium-sized transports bound for the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]) but from direct investment from [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] as well. The station included a casino, which brought in nearly 20 percent of the station's income. Security included a group of [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] guards controlled by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]], three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]], and over forty other combat-worthy [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] the commander of the starfighter contingent at Nwarcol was the former [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] pilot named [[Welinarro]].
